content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be dramatically improved by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives at the core of modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement loop that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and traditional standalone self-reflection methods. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while resolving its biggest limitation of getting stuck in local optima from narrow self-feedback.
